channel.title: Sam Morrow
channel.description: Drummer, software engineer and online-learning fanatic.

item.title: Code Mode
item.description: Code flows in, data flows out as Codey sits in isolation, trapped in his eternal sandbox This is Part 4 of the Progressive Discovery in MCP series...

item.title: The Nuclear Football
item.description: The Football is not a weapon. The Football is the authority to use weapons...

item.title: The Skill Dealer: Skills over MCP
item.description: The Skill Dealer does not simply overwhelm you with everything. The Skill Dealer gives you only what you need. Context is everything...

item.title: remarkable-mcp Update
item.description: Quick update on remarkable-mcp since the original post. Latest release is here...

item.title: MCP Doesn't Have a Context Problem
item.description: Mario Zechner wrote a post last year called "What if you don't need MCP. ". I like Mario...

item.title: Why Diffing Your MCP Server Matters
item.description: Your MCP server has a public interface. Tools, prompts, resources, capabilities: everything an AI client sees when it connects...

item.title: GitHub Universe: MCP Server Demo
item.description: I was honoured to be invited to demo the GitHub MCP Server at GitHub Universe with Toby Padilla...

item.title: Building an MCP Server for reMarkable
item.description: I've been using reMarkable tablets since 2021...

item.title: The Context - Special Episode ft. GitHub & Microsoft
item.description: Toby Padilla, Harald Kirschner and I will be live-streaming on The Context, on the MCP Developers Summit YouTube channel this coming Tuesday...

item.title: VS Code Live: Extending Agent Mode
item.description: Join us for VS Code Live: Extending Agent Mode, a livestream showing how to unlock the full potential of agent mode using MCP servers and extension to...

item.title: AI Won't Make Your Job Easier—so what will it do?
item.description: If you're like many people, the rapid rise of AI tools might bring a mix of excitement and, perhaps, some unease...
